svg.title: Golden Rectangle
svg.desc: A golden rectangle with a square cut from the left end, revealing a smaller golden rectangle on the right. phi = (1+sqrt(5))/2 ≈ 1.61803 Short side = 400, long side = 400*phi ≈ 647.2 Centered in 800x800: left = (800 - 647.2) / 2 = 76.4 top = (800 - 400) / 2 = 200 right = 76.4 + 647.2 = 723.6 bottom = 200 + 400 = 600 Square occupies left portion: width = 400 (the short side) square right edge x = 76.4 + 400 = 476.4 Remaining rectangle: x=476.4 to x=723.6, y=200 to y=600 width = 247.2 ≈ 400/phi height = 400 ratio = 400/247.2 ≈ 1.618 ✓ — it's another golden rectangle
